sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n13620" key="a)porrizo/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπορριζόω</orth>, <sense id="n13620.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">pull out by the roots,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τρίχας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0640.tlg001:3:66" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alciphr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.66</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
